articles.author: John Pye, Charlotte Graham-McLay
articles.title: Iranian women soccer players granted asylum in Australia are pictured training in Brisbane - AP News
articles.description: Two Iranian women soccer players have been seen training with the Brisbane Roar after Australia granted them asylum, and they stayed behind as teammates headed home. On Monday the club posted photos of Fatemeh Pasandideh and Atefeh Ramezanisadeh at a session …
articles.content: BRISBANE, Australia (AP) Two players from the Iranian womens soccer team have joined a practice session with a professional club in Brisbane in their first publicly-shared appearance since it emerged… [+4761 chars]
